## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check:public-clean`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run spec:validate` when specs change
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`

## Asset And Privacy Check

- [ ] No private hostnames, server paths, handoff notes, secrets, generated Gemini WAVs, or private deployment files were added.
- [ ] Any new media has documented source, license, and attribution in `docs/asset-policy.md` or nearby attribution files.
